AnthropicSettings.description: Settings for using Anthropic models in the fast-agent application.

default_model.description: Default model when Anthropic provider is selected without an explicit model
default_model.title: Default Model

default_headers.description: Custom headers to pass with every request
default_headers.title: Default Headers

cache_mode.description: Caching mode: off (disabled), prompt (cache tools+system), auto (also advance through recent conversation turns)
cache_mode.title: Cache Mode

cache_diagnostics.description: Enable first-party Anthropic cache-miss diagnosis for debugging. Adds a beta request field and provider diagnostics to responses.
cache_diagnostics.title: Cache Diagnostics

reasoning.description: Reasoning setting. Supports effort strings (for adaptive models), budget tokens (int), or toggle (bool). Use 0 or false to disable.
reasoning.title: Reasoning

task_budget.description: Anthropic task budget for agentic loops. Supports raw token counts or shorthand like 20k/128k. Use off/default to disable.
task_budget.title: Task Budget

structured_output_mode.description: Structured output mode: auto, json, or tool_use
structured_output_mode.title: Structured Output Mode

AnthropicSettings.title: AnthropicSettings

AnthropicUserLocationSettings.description: Approximate user location for Anthropic web search tool requests.
AnthropicUserLocationSettings.title: AnthropicUserLocationSettings

AnthropicWebFetchSettings.description: Anthropic built-in web_fetch server tool settings.
AnthropicWebFetchSettings.title: AnthropicWebFetchSettings

AnthropicWebSearchSettings.description: Anthropic built-in web_search server tool settings.
AnthropicWebSearchSettings.title: AnthropicWebSearchSettings

AzureSettings.description: Settings for using Azure OpenAI Service in the fast-agent application.

resource_name.description: Azure resource name (do not use with base_url)
resource_name.title: Resource Name

base_url.description: Full endpoint URL (do not use with resource_name)
base_url.title: Base Url

default_model.description: Default deployment/model when Azure provider is selected without an explicit model
default_model.title: Default Model

default_headers.description: Custom headers for all API requests
default_headers.title: Default Headers

AzureSettings.title: AzureSettings

BedrockSettings.description: Settings for using AWS Bedrock models in the fast-agent application.

default_model.description: Default model when Bedrock provider is selected without an explicit model
default_model.title: Default Model

reasoning.description: Unified reasoning setting (effort level or budget)
reasoning.title: Reasoning

reasoning_effort.description: Default reasoning effort: minimal, low, medium, high
reasoning_effort.title: Reasoning Effort

CardsSettings.description: Configuration for card pack registry selection.
CardsSettings.title: CardsSettings

CodexResponsesSettings.description: Settings for using Codex Responses via ChatGPT OAuth tokens.

default_model.description: Default model when the provider is selected without an explicit model
default_model.title: Default Model

text_verbosity.description: Text verbosity level: low, medium, high
text_verbosity.title: Text Verbosity

default_headers.description: Custom headers for all API requests
default_headers.title: Default Headers

transport.description: Responses transport mode override: sse, websocket, or auto. When unset, OpenAI Responses and Codex Responses prefer websocket with automatic SSE fallback.
transport.title: Transport

service_tier.description: Codex Responses service tier: fast (priority) or unset (standard).
service_tier.title: Service Tier

CodexResponsesSettings.title: CodexResponsesSettings

auto.description: Automatically compact history when context usage crosses the threshold
auto.title: Auto

threshold.description: Fraction of the model context window that triggers auto-compaction
threshold.title: Threshold

keep_turns.description: Number of recent complete turns kept verbatim after compaction
keep_turns.title: Keep Turns

prompt.description: Custom summarization prompt for compaction. Inline text, or a path to a text/markdown file. None uses the built-in prompt (see /compact prompt).
prompt.title: Prompt

params.description: Keyword arguments passed to the custom environment class.
params.title: Params

DeepSeekSettings.description: Settings for using DeepSeek models in the fast-agent application.

default_model.description: Default model when DeepSeek provider is selected without an explicit model
default_model.title: Default Model

default_headers.description: Custom headers for all API requests
default_headers.title: Default Headers

DeepSeekSettings.title: DeepSeekSettings

type.description: Run shell commands in Docker or a Docker-compatible CLI.
type.title: Type

image.description: Container image to start. Provide exactly one of `image` or `container`.
image.title: Image

container.description: Existing container name or ID to execute in. Provide exactly one of `image` or `container`.
container.title: Container

container_cli.description: Executable used for container operations, for example `docker` or `wslc`.
container_cli.title: Container Cli

shell.description: Shell executable used inside the container.
shell.title: Shell

mounts.description: Docker bind mounts. Use this instead of volume flags in `docker_args`.
mounts.title: Mounts

env.description: Environment variables applied to shell execution.
env.title: Env

docker_args.description: Extra container creation arguments. Volume and lifecycle flags are rejected; use `mounts` for bind mounts.
docker_args.title: Docker Args

source.description: Host workspace path to bind mount. Relative paths resolve against the workspace root.
source.title: Source

target.description: Absolute path inside the Docker container.
target.title: Target

mode.description: Docker bind mount access mode: read-only (`ro`) or read-write (`rw`).
mode.title: Mode

default_model.description: Default model when generic provider is selected without an explicit model
default_model.title: Default Model

default_headers.description: Custom headers for all API requests
default_headers.title: Default Headers

default_headers.description: Custom headers for all API requests

transport.description: Responses transport mode override: sse, websocket, or auto fallback.
transport.title: Transport

HarnessAppSettings.description: Configuration for the harness application boundary.

entrypoint.title: Entrypoint
entrypoint.description: Import path for a custom harness app factory, as module:function.

HarnessAppSettings.title: HarnessAppSettings

source.description: Hugging Face bucket identifier in `namespace/name` form.
source.title: Source

mount_path.description: Absolute path where the bucket is mounted inside the sandbox.
mount_path.title: Mount Path

read_only.description: Whether the bucket mount is read-only.
read_only.title: Read Only

path.description: Optional subfolder prefix inside the bucket to mount.
path.title: Path

type.description: Run shell commands in a Hugging Face Sandbox.
type.title: Type

bucket_mounts.description: Legacy bucket-only mount shorthand. Prefer `volume_mounts` for new config.
bucket_mounts.title: Bucket Mounts

volume_mounts.description: Hugging Face Sandbox volume mounts using `hf://...:/mount/path[:ro|:rw]` syntax.
volume_mounts.title: Volume Mounts

env.description: Environment variables applied to shell execution.
env.title: Env

default_model.description: Default model when HuggingFace provider is selected without an explicit model
default_model.title: Default Model

default_provider.description: Default inference provider (e.g., groq, fireworks-ai, cerebras)
default_provider.title: Default Provider

default_headers.description: Custom headers for all API requests
default_headers.title: Default Headers

uri.description: Hugging Face mount URI: `hf://[models|datasets|spaces|buckets]/namespace/name[/path]:/mount/path[:ro|:rw]`. The type defaults to models.
uri.title: Uri

cwd.description: Working directory for local shell and file tools. Relative paths resolve against the workspace root.
cwd.title: Cwd

env.description: Environment variables applied to shell execution.
env.title: Env

LoggerSettings.description: Logger settings for the fast-agent application.

progress_display.title: Progress Display
progress_display.description: Enable or disable the progress display

path.title: Path
path.description: Explicit log path. When omitted, file logs are written under the active fast-agent home.

batch_size.title: Batch Size
batch_size.description: Number of events to accumulate before processing

flush_interval.title: Flush Interval
flush_interval.description: How often to flush events in seconds

max_queue_size.title: Max Queue Size
max_queue_size.description: Maximum queue size for event processing

http_timeout.title: Http Timeout
http_timeout.description: HTTP timeout seconds for event transport

show_chat.title: Show Chat
show_chat.description: Show chat User/Assistant on the console

stream_reprint_banner.title: Stream Reprint Banner
stream_reprint_banner.description: Show a bright banner before reprinted final streamed assistant responses

show_tools.title: Show Tools
show_tools.description: Show MCP Sever tool calls on the console

truncate_tools.title: Truncate Tools
truncate_tools.description: Truncate display of long tool calls

enable_markup.title: Enable Markup
enable_markup.description: Enable markup in console output. Disable for outputs that may conflict with rich console formatting

enable_prompt_marks.title: Enable Prompt Marks
enable_prompt_marks.description: Emit OSC 133 prompt marks for terminals that support scrollbar markers.

theme_file.title: Theme File
theme_file.description: Optional Rich theme file for console styles. Relative paths resolve from fast-agent.yaml.

code_theme.title: Code Theme
code_theme.description: Pygments / Rich syntax theme for fenced code blocks and markdown code rendering.

render_fences_with_syntax.title: Render Fences With Syntax
render_fences_with_syntax.description: Render assistant markdown code fences with Rich Syntax instead of markdown fence blocks

code_word_wrap.title: Code Word Wrap
code_word_wrap.description: Wrap Syntax-rendered code blocks instead of cropping at the viewport edge

terminal_images.description: Render image content in capable terminals.

apply_patch_preview_max_lines.description: Maximum lines to show in apply_patch previews before appending '(+N more lines)' (0/None = no limit)
apply_patch_preview_max_lines.title: Apply Patch Preview Max Lines

LoggerSettings.title: LoggerSettings

MCPRootSettings.description: Represents a root directory configuration for an MCP server.

uri.title: Uri
uri.description: The URI identifying the root. Must start with file://

server_uri_alias.title: Server Uri Alias
server_uri_alias.description: Optional URI alias for presentation to the server

MCPRootSettings.title: MCPRootSettings

MCPServerAuthSettings.description:
Represents authentication configuration for a server.

Minimal OAuth v2.1 support with sensible defaults.
MCPServerAuthSettings.title: MCPServerAuthSettings

MCPServerSettings.description: Represents the configuration for an individual server.

management.title: Management
management.description: Whether fast-agent connects locally or delegates MCP execution to the provider.

command.title: Command
command.description: The command to execute the server (e.g. npx).

args.title: Args
args.description: The arguments for the server command.

read_timeout_seconds.title: Read Timeout Seconds
read_timeout_seconds.description: The timeout in seconds for the session.

ping_interval_seconds.title: Ping Interval Seconds
ping_interval_seconds.description: Interval for MCP ping requests. Set <=0 to disable pinging.

max_missed_pings.title: Max Missed Pings
max_missed_pings.description: Number of consecutive missed ping responses before treating the connection as failed.

http_timeout_seconds.title: Http Timeout Seconds
http_timeout_seconds.description: Overall HTTP timeout (seconds) for StreamableHTTP transport. Defaults to MCP SDK.

http_read_timeout_seconds.title: Http Read Timeout Seconds
http_read_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP read timeout (seconds) for StreamableHTTP transport. Defaults to MCP SDK.

read_transport_sse_timeout_seconds.title: Read Transport Sse Timeout Seconds
read_transport_sse_timeout_seconds.description: The timeout in seconds for the server connection.

url.title: Url
url.description: The URL for the server (e.g. for SSE/SHTTP transport).

access_token.title: Access Token
access_token.description: Provider-neutral bearer token for local URL servers or provider-managed MCP.

auth.description: The authentication configuration for the server.

roots.title: Roots
roots.description: Root directories this server has access to.

env.title: Env
env.description: Environment variables to pass to the server process.

sampling.description: Sampling settings for this Client/Server pair

elicitation.description: Elicitation settings for this Client/Server pair

cwd.title: Cwd
cwd.description: Working directory for the executed server command.

load_on_start.title: Load On Start
load_on_start.description: Whether to connect to this server automatically when the agent starts.

include_instructions.title: Include Instructions
include_instructions.description: Whether to include this server's instructions in the system prompt (default: True).

defer_loading.title: Defer Loading
defer_loading.description: Provider-managed OpenAI Responses hint to defer remote tool loading.

MCPServerSettings.title: MCPServerSettings

MCPTimelineSettings.description: Configuration for MCP activity timeline display.

steps.title: Steps
steps.description: Number of timeline buckets to render.

step_seconds.title: Step Seconds
step_seconds.description: Duration of each timeline bucket in seconds.

MCPTimelineSettings.title: MCPTimelineSettings

transport.description: Responses transport mode override: sse, websocket, or auto. When unset, OpenAI Responses and Codex Responses prefer websocket with automatic SSE fallback.

service_tier.description: Responses service tier: fast (priority) or flex.

reasoning.description: Unified reasoning setting (effort level or budget)

default_model.description: Default model when Open Responses provider is selected without an explicit model

reasoning.description: Unified reasoning setting (effort level or budget)
reasoning.title: Reasoning

reasoning_effort.description: Default reasoning effort: minimal, low, medium, high

default_headers.description: Custom headers for all API requests
default_headers.title: Default Headers

transport.description: Responses transport mode: sse (default), websocket, or auto fallback.

service_tier.description: Responses service tier: fast (priority) or flex.

OpenRouterSettings.description: Settings for using OpenRouter models via its OpenAI-compatible API.

default_model.description: Default model when OpenRouter provider is selected without an explicit model
default_model.title: Default Model

default_headers.description: Custom headers for all API requests
default_headers.title: Default Headers

OpenRouterSettings.title: OpenRouterSettings

OpenTelemetrySettings.description: OpenTelemetry settings for the fast-agent application.

sample_rate.description: Sample rate for tracing (1.0 = sample everything)
sample_rate.title: Sample Rate

OpenTelemetrySettings.title: OpenTelemetrySettings

PluginsSettings.description: Configuration for command plugin discovery and marketplace selection.
PluginsSettings.title: PluginsSettings

tool_profile.description: Model-facing shell contract: 'minimal_process' exposes Bash and Process; 'native' retains the legacy execute/poll_process/terminate_process tools

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum seconds without command output before terminating
timeout_seconds.title: Timeout Seconds

warning_interval_seconds.description: Show timeout warnings every N seconds
warning_interval_seconds.title: Warning Interval Seconds

interactive_use_pty.description: Use a PTY for interactive prompt shell commands
interactive_use_pty.title: Interactive Use Pty

output_display_lines.description: Maximum shell output lines to display (head/tail with an ellipsis when truncated; None = no limit)
output_display_lines.title: Output Display Lines

show_bash.description: Show shell command output on the console
show_bash.title: Show Bash

output_byte_limit.description: Override model-based output byte limit (None = auto)
output_byte_limit.title: Output Byte Limit

managed_process_poll_history_folding.description: Control repetitive quiet poll_process history folding: 'auto' uses validated model metadata, 'on' forces folding, and 'off' disables it
managed_process_poll_history_folding.title: Managed Process Poll History Folding

missing_cwd_policy.description: Policy when an agent shell cwd is missing or invalid
missing_cwd_policy.title: Missing Cwd Policy

prefer_local_shell.description: In ACP mode, keep the local fast-agent shell runtime instead of replacing it with the ACP client's terminal runtime when the client advertises terminal support
prefer_local_shell.title: Prefer Local Shell

enable_read_text_file.description: Expose a local read_text_file tool (ACP-compatible signature) when shell runtime is enabled
enable_read_text_file.title: Enable Read Text File

enable_attach_media.description: Expose attach_media when shell runtime is enabled. 'auto' exposes it only for models with non-text attachment support; 'on' exposes it with call-time validation; 'off' disables it.
enable_attach_media.title: Enable Attach Media

write_text_file_mode.description: Control which local file edit tool is exposed when shell runtime is enabled ('auto' uses apply_patch for Codex and GPT-5.2+ models, edit_file for Anthropic-series models, and write_text_file plus edit_file otherwise; 'on' always exposes write_text_file plus edit_file; 'apply_patch' always exposes apply_patch; 'off' disables local file edit tools)

SkillsSettings.description: Configuration for the skills directory override.
SkillsSettings.title: SkillsSettings

completion_menu_reserved_lines.description: Prompt-toolkit lines reserved below the input for completion menus.
completion_menu_reserved_lines.title: Completion Menu Reserved Lines

TensorZeroSettings.description: Settings for using TensorZero LLM gateway.

default_model.description: Default function name when TensorZero provider is selected without an explicit model
default_model.title: Default Model

default_headers.description: Custom headers for all API requests
default_headers.title: Default Headers

TensorZeroSettings.title: TensorZeroSettings

TerminalImageSettings.description: Terminal image rendering settings for chat/tool output.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Render image content in the terminal when supported.

width.description: Image render width: cells, percentage (e.g. '80%'), 'auto', or null.

height.description: Image render height: cells, percentage (e.g. '40%'), 'auto', or null.

render_assistant.title: Render Assistant
render_assistant.description: Render images in final assistant messages.

TerminalImageSettings.title: TerminalImageSettings

XAISettings.description: Settings for using xAI Grok models via the Responses API.

default_model.description: Default model when xAI provider is selected without an explicit model
default_model.title: Default Model

default_headers.description: Custom headers for all API requests
default_headers.title: Default Headers

x_search.description: Enable xAI X Search remote tool.
x_search.title: X Search

XAISettings.title: XAISettings

excluded_domains.description: Domains to exclude from xAI web search results (maximum 5).
excluded_domains.title: Excluded Domains

enable_image_understanding.description: Enable xAI image understanding for images encountered during web search.
enable_image_understanding.title: Enable Image Understanding

description: Configuration schema for MCP Agent applications

mcp.description: MCP config, such as MCP servers

execution_engine.title: Execution Engine
execution_engine.description: Execution engine for the fast-agent application

home.title: Home
home.description: Base directory for fast-agent runtime data (defaults to .fast-agent).

default_environment.title: Default Environment
default_environment.description: Default named execution environment. The implicit default is local.

model_source.title: Model Source
model_source.description: Where the default model was resolved from for the current run, if noteworthy.

cli_model_override.title: Cli Model Override
cli_model_override.description: Model override supplied by the CLI for the current run, if any.

auto_sampling.title: Auto Sampling
auto_sampling.description: Enable automatic sampling model selection if not explicitly configured

session_history.title: Session History
session_history.description: Persist session history in the environment sessions folder (default: True).

session_history_window.title: Session History Window
session_history_window.description: Maximum number of sessions to keep in the rolling window (default: 20).

git_aware.title: Git Aware
git_aware.description: Persist git repository provenance in session snapshots and trace exports.

compaction.description: History compaction settings (auto trigger threshold, retained turns, prompt).

anthropic.description: Settings for using Anthropic models in the fast-agent application

otel.description: OpenTelemetry logging settings for the fast-agent application

openai.description: Settings for using OpenAI models in the fast-agent application

responses.description: Settings for using OpenAI Responses models in the fast-agent application

openresponses.description: Settings for using Open Responses models in the fast-agent application

codexresponses.description: Settings for using Codex Responses models in the fast-agent application

deepseek.description: Settings for using DeepSeek models in the fast-agent application

google.description: Settings for using DeepSeek models in the fast-agent application

xai.description: Settings for using xAI Grok models in the fast-agent application

metaai.description: Settings for using MetaAI Muse models in the fast-agent application

openrouter.description: Settings for using OpenRouter models in the fast-agent application

generic.description: Settings for using Generic models in the fast-agent application

tensorzero.description: Settings for using TensorZero inference gateway

azure.description: Settings for using Azure OpenAI Service in the fast-agent application

aliyun.description: Settings for using Aliyun OpenAI Service in the fast-agent application

bedrock.description: Settings for using AWS Bedrock models in the fast-agent application

hf.description: Settings for HuggingFace authentication (used for MCP connections)

groq.description: Settings for using the Groq provider in the fast-agent application

logger.description: Logger settings for the fast-agent application

mcp_ui_output_dir.title: Mcp Ui Output Dir
mcp_ui_output_dir.description: Directory where MCP-UI HTML files are written. Relative paths are resolved from CWD.

mcp_timeline.description: Display settings for MCP activity timelines.

skills.description: Local skills discovery and selection settings.

plugins.description: Command plugin selection and marketplace settings.

commands.title: Commands
commands.description: Global plugin command actions loaded from fast-agent.yaml.

shell_execution.description: Shell execution timeout and warning settings.

title: MCP Agent Configuration Schema
